How It Works

Three simple steps to deliver the most memorable postcard anyone has ever received.

01
🎨

Design Your Dickle

Use the Dickle Creator to build a stylized comic character version of your very own pickle. Vibe, expression, accessories — all customizable.

02
✍️

Write Your Message

Add a heartfelt note, a pun so bad it's perfect, or just let the pickle speak for itself. No explanation needed.

03
📬

We Mail It

A real physical postcard with your custom Dickle Pic arrives in their actual mailbox. Tactile. Surprising. Unforgettable.

04
🥒

They're Pickled Pink

They hold it in their hands. They cannot explain it to anyone. They absolutely love it. Mission accomplished.

Build Your Dickle

Every pickle is unique. Yours should be too. Design a comic character that truly represents your special pickle.

```
😏

YOUR DICKLE

Smooth Operator Wholesome Passionate Too Cool Excited Loyal Cheeky In Love
```

Every Occasion Deserves a Dickle

There's no wrong time to send a pickle. There are only missed opportunities.

💘

Valentine's Day

"Roses are red, pickles are green…"

🎂

Birthday

A year older. Still your special pickle.

💍

Anniversary

Another year of being in the brine together.

🫂

Just Because

The most powerful reason of all.

✈️

Long Distance

Miss them? Send your pickle. Say nothing else.

🎉

Congratulations

Nothing says "I'm proud of you" like a dill.

🥹

I'm Sorry

Sometimes a pickle says what words cannot.

🤝

New Job

Send it to your work nemesis. Keep them guessing.

What They'll Actually Hold In Their Hands

A real postcard. Printed. Stamped. Mailed. By us. To them. This is not a DM.

🥒

miss me?
